| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUTVdsOVNfUUo0My1NbTdORzFodz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUTVdsOVNfUUo0My1NbTdORzFodz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | |  | | --- | | **NFL Rights Wars, Malone Estate Planning, BalthazarвҖҷs Election Night** | | Happy Friday and welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon compendium of PuckвҖҷs best new reporting.     First up today, **Matt Belloni** breaks down **Bob Iger** вҖҷs blockbuster quarter: After losing *billions* on streaming, Disney *finally* projects major profits and 10 percent margins as the once вҖңterribleвҖқ business shows signs of life. Too bad linear TV is losing money faster than streaming can replace itвҖҰ     Plus, below the fold: **Lauren Sherman** assesses the latest LVMH succession intrigue as **Alexandre Arnault** leaves Tiffany to become deputy C.E.O. at MoГ«t Hennessy. **John Ourand** digs into the NFL-Amazon partnership, which TV execs see as a precursor to an *inevitable* live sports rights showdown between legacy media and Big Tech. And **Tara Palmeri** presents her post-election conversation with Republican pollster **Patrick Ruffini** about the future of the G.O.P. coalition beyond **Trump** 2.0.     Meanwhile, in the Puck podcast universe: **Dylan Byers** connects with CNBCвҖҷs **Alex Sherman** on *The Grill Room* to dish about the Disney succession sweepstakes, **John Malone** вҖҷs estate planning, and more. On *The Town* , Matt is joined by Roku Media president **Charlie Collier** to discuss how the streamer competes with tech behemoths like Amazon and Google. On *Fashion People* , Lauren rings up **Emily Sundberg** , of Feed Me fame, to chat about bridge-and-tunnel fashion, private members clubs, and the state of fashion media writ large. And on *The Powers That Be* , Lauren sits down with **Peter Hamby** to unpack GapвҖҷs revival and what TrumpвҖҷs tariffs could mean for luxury goods. | |  | | [Bob IgerвҖҷs Netflix Moment](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | DisneyвҖҷs C.E.O. has come roaring back from billions lost on streaming to project major profits and 10 percent margins as the onetime вҖңterribleвҖқ business shows signs of life for everyone. If only TV wasnвҖҷt losing money faster. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Arnault Boy Is All Grown Up](https://email.puck.) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | The LVMH succession drama heats up as 32-year-old AlexandreвҖ”last seen at the Trump rally at MSGвҖ”leaves Tiffany for the mothershipвҖҷs booze business, where his celebrity connections and brand building could prop up a lagging division desperately in need of reinvention. | |  | | [Is the NFL Falling Hard for Amazon?](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUTVdsOVNfUUo0My1NbTdORzFodz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3Mvd2lsbC10aGUtbmZsLXB1dC1tb3JlLWdhbWVzLW9uLWFtYXpvbi1wcmltZS8_) | | JOHN OURAND | | For the first time, a streaming service outdrew one of the NFLвҖҷs top TV partners in same-week viewership. Now, TV execs are grumbling that the NFL is setting up a future rights battle by giving streamers a taste of potential glory with the choicest matchups. | |  | | [The Oracle of вҖҷ24](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUTVdsOVNfUUo0My1NbTdORzFodz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcGF0cmljay1ydWZmaW5pLXRoZS1vcmFjbGUtb2YtMjAyNC8_) | | TARA PALMERI | | A post-election conversation with veteran Republican pollster Patrick Ruffini about what Democrats got wrong, Republicans got very right, and the bizarro rainbow coalition that ushered Trump back into the White House. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Disney Succession Tea Leaves](https://email.puck.) | | DYLAN BYERS | | CNBCвҖҷs Alex Sherman joins Dylan for the ultimate dish-fest across a series of juicy and mission-critical topicsвҖ“Disney succession tea leaves, Dana Walden versus the outsiders, John MaloneвҖҷs Maffei moves, NBCвҖҷs вҖңRoundball RockвҖқ deal blockers, ComcastвҖҷs cable trial balloon, and much more. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Digital TV Giants: Amazon, Google, and... Roku?](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by Roku Media president Charlie Collier to talk about the most under-discussed streaming player in Hollywood, how it differentiates itself from other companies, and how they compete with tech giants Amazon and Google. He also discusses what he learned running AMC and FoxвҖҷs broadcast network and how the industry has changed, then makes the case for the return of ad-supported television on streaming. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Bridge-and-Tunnel Fashion & Balthazar on Election Night](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUTVdsOVNfUUo0My1NbTdORzFodz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL2JyaWRnZS1hbmQtdHVubmVsLWZhc2hpb24tYW5kLWJhbHRoYXphci1vbi1lbGVjdGlvbi1uaWdodC8_) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | Lauren catches up with Emily Sundberg, author of the Substack Feed Me. They discuss Barbour jacket knockoffs, Casa Cipriani, how the fashion industry measures up to other crazy industries, Taylor SwiftвҖҷs favorite restaurant Corner Store, cracks in the paint at Zero Bond, and plenty more. Plus, Lauren tips off listeners on whatвҖҷs happening with LVMH heir Alexandre Arnault and a W magazine acquisition. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [A Fashion Comeback Story & TrumpвҖҷs Luxury Tariffs](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & LAUREN SHERMAN | | Lauren Sherman and Peter dig into the latest dramas percolating through the fashion industry: GapвҖҷs attempt to revive itself as AmericaвҖҷs favorite mall brand, the Arnault family cozying up to Donald Trump, what the former-and-future presidentвҖҷs tariffs could mean for luxury goods, and much more. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUTVdsOVNfUUo0My1NbTdORzFodz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
